repositories.title: google-labs-code / design.md
repositories.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.
repositories.summary: Defines a file format for describing visual identity and design systems to coding agents. Combines machine-readable design tokens in YAML front matter with human-readable design guidance in markdown. Provides linting to catch broken references, contrast issues, section-order problems, and other structural findings. Includes a diff command to compare two DESIGN.md files for token and prose regressions. Supports exporting tokens to other design-token formats for downstream use.
summary_bullets: Defines a file format for describing visual identity and design systems to coding agents.
Combines machine-readable design tokens in YAML front matter with human-readable design guidance in markdown.
Provides linting to catch broken references, contrast issues, section-order problems, and other structural findings.
Includes a diff command to compare two DESIGN.md files for token and prose regressions.
Supports exporting tokens to other design-token formats for downstream use.

repositories.title: calesthio / OpenMontage
repositories.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
repositories.summary: An open-source system for producing videos with AI-assisted planning, asset generation, editing, and composition. Can start from a prompt or from a reference video to generate a production plan and final edit. Supports both image-based animated videos and real-footage documentary-style montage workflows. Includes research, scripting, narration, subtitles, music selection, and rendering in one pipeline. Built for use with AI coding assistants and exposes reproducible prompts, tools, and cost breakdowns.
summary_bullets: An open-source system for producing videos with AI-assisted planning, asset generation, editing, and composition.
Can start from a prompt or from a reference video to generate a production plan and final edit.
Supports both image-based animated videos and real-footage documentary-style montage workflows.
Includes research, scripting, narration, subtitles, music selection, and rendering in one pipeline.
Built for use with AI coding assistants and exposes reproducible prompts, tools, and cost breakdowns.

repositories.title: xbtlin / ai-berkshire
repositories.description: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.
repositories.summary: A Chinese-language AI-assisted investment research framework centered on value investing methods. Structures research around four investing styles and enforces clear buy, hold, or reject conclusions. Adds workflow safeguards like multi-source verification, explicit confidence levels, and falsification checks. Provides reusable skills for company research, earnings analysis, industry screening, portfolio review, and news attribution. Aims to make a single person with Claude behave more like a disciplined research team.
summary_bullets: A Chinese-language AI-assisted investment research framework centered on value investing methods.
Structures research around four investing styles and enforces clear buy, hold, or reject conclusions.
Adds workflow safeguards like multi-source verification, explicit confidence levels, and falsification checks.
Provides reusable skills for company research, earnings analysis, industry screening, portfolio review, and news attribution.
Aims to make a single person with Claude behave more like a disciplined research team.

repositories.title: mauriceboe / TREK
repositories.description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.
repositories.summary: A self-hosted collaborative travel planner for building trips in real time with other people. Combines itinerary planning, map-based place management, budgets, packing lists, reservations, and trip journals. Supports collaboration features like shared trips, invites, role-based access, chat, polls, and sync. Includes mobile and PWA support so it can run from a browser on iOS and Android. Adds AI and MCP integration so agents can help manage trips, plans, and packing lists.
summary_bullets: A self-hosted collaborative travel planner for building trips in real time with other people.
Combines itinerary planning, map-based place management, budgets, packing lists, reservations, and trip journals.
Supports collaboration features like shared trips, invites, role-based access, chat, polls, and sync.
Includes mobile and PWA support so it can run from a browser on iOS and Android.
Adds AI and MCP integration so agents can help manage trips, plans, and packing lists.

repositories.title: apple / container
repositories.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
repositories.summary: A Mac tool for creating and running Linux containers as lightweight virtual machines. Targets Apple silicon and works with OCI images from standard container registries. Provides install, update, downgrade, and uninstall workflows for the container service. Positions itself as a developer tool for local container workflows on macOS. Documented around system service management and image compatibility rather than orchestration.
summary_bullets: A Mac tool for creating and running Linux containers as lightweight virtual machines.
Targets Apple silicon and works with OCI images from standard container registries.
Provides install, update, downgrade, and uninstall workflows for the container service.
Positions itself as a developer tool for local container workflows on macOS.
Documented around system service management and image compatibility rather than orchestration.

repositories.title: JCodesMore / ai-website-cloner-template
repositories.description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents
repositories.summary: A template for rebuilding an existing website into a modern Next.js codebase with AI agents. Runs a multi-phase clone workflow: reconnaissance, token extraction, component specification, parallel build, and QA. Aims to help with site migration, recovery of lost source code, and learning from production layouts. Includes instructions for multiple AI coding agents and a shared agent-instructions setup. Emphasizes extracting real design tokens, assets, and computed styles before reconstruction.
summary_bullets: A template for rebuilding an existing website into a modern Next.js codebase with AI agents.
Runs a multi-phase clone workflow: reconnaissance, token extraction, component specification, parallel build, and QA.
Aims to help with site migration, recovery of lost source code, and learning from production layouts.
Includes instructions for multiple AI coding agents and a shared agent-instructions setup.
Emphasizes extracting real design tokens, assets, and computed styles before reconstruction.

repositories.title: every-app / open-seo
repositories.description: Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs
repositories.summary: An open-source SEO platform positioned as a cheaper, controllable alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs. Covers keyword research, rank tracking, domain insights, backlinks, site audits, and AI search visibility. Exposes an MCP server so coding agents can query SEO data directly from the tool. Ships reusable agent skills for SEO workflows like setup, coaching, keyword research, clustering, and competitive analysis. Supports self-hosting with Docker or Cloudflare and a hosted version for users who do not want to run it themselves.
summary_bullets: An open-source SEO platform positioned as a cheaper, controllable alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs.
Covers keyword research, rank tracking, domain insights, backlinks, site audits, and AI search visibility.
Exposes an MCP server so coding agents can query SEO data directly from the tool.
Ships reusable agent skills for SEO workflows like setup, coaching, keyword research, clustering, and competitive analysis.
Supports self-hosting with Docker or Cloudflare and a hosted version for users who do not want to run it themselves.

repositories.title: garrytan / gstack
repositories.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
repositories.summary: A workflow and command system for using Claude Code as a larger engineering team. Organizes product thinking, planning, design review, code review, QA, shipping, and retrospectives into slash commands. Includes guidance for multi-agent work, browser-based QA, security checks, and release automation. Aims to help founders and engineers ship faster with structured agent roles instead of ad hoc prompting. Also documents cross-model workflows, skills collections, and operational best practices for agentic development.
summary_bullets: A workflow and command system for using Claude Code as a larger engineering team.
Organizes product thinking, planning, design review, code review, QA, shipping, and retrospectives into slash commands.
Includes guidance for multi-agent work, browser-based QA, security checks, and release automation.
Aims to help founders and engineers ship faster with structured agent roles instead of ad hoc prompting.
Also documents cross-model workflows, skills collections, and operational best practices for agentic development.

repositories.title: aws / agent-toolkit-for-aws
repositories.description: Official, AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help AI agents build on AWS
repositories.summary: Provides tools, skills, and plugins so AI coding agents can work with AWS services safely and effectively. Covers service selection, infrastructure deployment, serverless, containers, storage, observability, and billing. Includes specialized workflows for building AI agents on AWS and for DevSecOps tasks like incident review and vulnerability scanning. Supports multiple agent surfaces, including Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Kiro. Also ships AWS MCP server guidance and rules files to steer agent behavior during AWS tasks.
summary_bullets: Provides tools, skills, and plugins so AI coding agents can work with AWS services safely and effectively.
Covers service selection, infrastructure deployment, serverless, containers, storage, observability, and billing.
Includes specialized workflows for building AI agents on AWS and for DevSecOps tasks like incident review and vulnerability scanning.
Supports multiple agent surfaces, including Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Kiro.
Also ships AWS MCP server guidance and rules files to steer agent behavior during AWS tasks.

repositories.title: mukul975 / Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
repositories.description: 817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0
repositories.summary: A large open-source library of cybersecurity skills for AI agents. Covers many security domains including cloud security, threat hunting, incident response, malware analysis, and devsecops. Maps each skill across multiple security frameworks such as ATT&CK, NIST CSF, ATLAS, D3FEND, AI RMF, and F3. Designed so an agent can follow practitioner-style workflows instead of guessing tool steps. Targets platforms like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and other skills-compatible systems.
summary_bullets: A large open-source library of cybersecurity skills for AI agents.
Covers many security domains including cloud security, threat hunting, incident response, malware analysis, and devsecops.
Maps each skill across multiple security frameworks such as ATT&CK, NIST CSF, ATLAS, D3FEND, AI RMF, and F3.
Designed so an agent can follow practitioner-style workflows instead of guessing tool steps.
Targets platforms like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and other skills-compatible systems.

repositories.title: alibaba / page-agent
repositories.description: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.
repositories.summary: Lets a web application embed an agent that can control the page using natural language. Operates through in-page JavaScript rather than requiring a browser extension, headless browser, or screenshots. Aims to make SaaS products, forms, and admin workflows easier to automate or make accessible. Supports bringing your own LLM and can optionally extend across multiple pages with a browser extension. Also exposes an MCP server for external agent control.
summary_bullets: Lets a web application embed an agent that can control the page using natural language.
Operates through in-page JavaScript rather than requiring a browser extension, headless browser, or screenshots.
Aims to make SaaS products, forms, and admin workflows easier to automate or make accessible.
Supports bringing your own LLM and can optionally extend across multiple pages with a browser extension.
Also exposes an MCP server for external agent control.

repositories.title: IceWhaleTech / CasaOS
repositories.description: CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.
repositories.summary: A personal cloud platform for home and small-server environments. Focuses on a friendly UI for managing files, drives, apps, and widgets without requiring technical expertise. Supports one-click installation of popular self-hosted apps like Nextcloud, Home Assistant, AdGuard, and Jellyfin. Runs on a range of hardware including Raspberry Pi, NUCs, and other x86 or ARM systems. Designed to reduce reliance on SaaS by giving users local control over data and services.
summary_bullets: A personal cloud platform for home and small-server environments.
Focuses on a friendly UI for managing files, drives, apps, and widgets without requiring technical expertise.
Supports one-click installation of popular self-hosted apps like Nextcloud, Home Assistant, AdGuard, and Jellyfin.
Runs on a range of hardware including Raspberry Pi, NUCs, and other x86 or ARM systems.
Designed to reduce reliance on SaaS by giving users local control over data and services.

repositories.title: opendatalab / MinerU
repositories.description: Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.
repositories.summary: A document parsing engine that converts PDFs, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, images, and web pages into structured Markdown or JSON. Built for LLM, RAG, and agent workflows that need accurate extraction from complex documents. Handles tables, formulas, reading order, headers and footers, scanned pages, handwriting, and multilingual OCR. Offers multiple integration paths including MCP, SDKs, CLI, REST API, Docker, and no-code web clients. Supports private offline deployment and multiple backend modes for different accuracy and performance needs.
summary_bullets: A document parsing engine that converts PDFs, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, images, and web pages into structured Markdown or JSON.
Built for LLM, RAG, and agent workflows that need accurate extraction from complex documents.
Handles tables, formulas, reading order, headers and footers, scanned pages, handwriting, and multilingual OCR.
Offers multiple integration paths including MCP, SDKs, CLI, REST API, Docker, and no-code web clients.
Supports private offline deployment and multiple backend modes for different accuracy and performance needs.

repositories.title: Free-TV / IPTV
repositories.description: M3U Playlist for free TV channels
repositories.summary: Provides a free M3U playlist of TV channels from around the world. Focuses on mainstream free channels and excludes paid, adult, and politically or religiously targeted channels. Documents how the playlist is generated and how contributors should submit updates. Emphasizes quality over quantity, with a preference for working HD streams and a single URL per channel. Intended for use with IPTV players that can consume the published playlist URL.
summary_bullets: Provides a free M3U playlist of TV channels from around the world.
Focuses on mainstream free channels and excludes paid, adult, and politically or religiously targeted channels.
Documents how the playlist is generated and how contributors should submit updates.
Emphasizes quality over quantity, with a preference for working HD streams and a single URL per channel.
Intended for use with IPTV players that can consume the published playlist URL.

repositories.title: shanraisshan / claude-code-best-practice
repositories.description: from vibe coding to agentic engineering - practice makes claude perfect
repositories.summary: A collection of best practices, workflows, commands, agents, skills, and hooks for Claude Code. Organizes practical guidance for planning, context management, review, testing, shipping, and cross-model workflows. Includes a large catalog of tips for using CLI features, memory, rules files, worktrees, plugins, and subagents. Acts as a reference for building disciplined agentic engineering workflows rather than relying on prompts alone. Also compares related workflow repositories and points to reusable patterns for development teams.
summary_bullets: A collection of best practices, workflows, commands, agents, skills, and hooks for Claude Code.
Organizes practical guidance for planning, context management, review, testing, shipping, and cross-model workflows.
Includes a large catalog of tips for using CLI features, memory, rules files, worktrees, plugins, and subagents.
Acts as a reference for building disciplined agentic engineering workflows rather than relying on prompts alone.
Also compares related workflow repositories and points to reusable patterns for development teams.

repositories.title: NanmiCoder / MediaCrawler
repositories.description: 小红书笔记 | 评论爬虫、抖音视频 | 评论爬虫、快手视频 | 评论爬虫、B 站视频 ｜ 评论爬虫、微博帖子 ｜ 评论爬虫、百度贴吧帖子 ｜ 百度贴吧评论回复爬虫 | 知乎问答文章｜评论爬虫
repositories.summary: A crawler for collecting public content from major Chinese social media platforms. Supports platforms such as Xiaohongshu, Douyin, Kuaishou, Bilibili, Weibo, Tieba, and Zhihu. Uses Playwright and saved login state to reduce the need for reverse engineering signed requests. Includes keyword search, post detail collection, comment fetching, creator-page crawling, and proxy support. Provides both command-line and web UI workflows, plus multiple output and storage formats.
summary_bullets: A crawler for collecting public content from major Chinese social media platforms.
Supports platforms such as Xiaohongshu, Douyin, Kuaishou, Bilibili, Weibo, Tieba, and Zhihu.
Uses Playwright and saved login state to reduce the need for reverse engineering signed requests.
Includes keyword search, post detail collection, comment fetching, creator-page crawling, and proxy support.
Provides both command-line and web UI workflows, plus multiple output and storage formats.
